use_cases: Display user profile pictures in dashboards and settings pages
Show author attribution on blog posts and articles
Render team member avatars in organizational charts
Display user avatars in comment sections and forums
Show user identity in notification and chat interfaces
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based avatar component with support for images, text fallbacks, and circular styling. Built with forwardRef pattern for proper React integration and Tailwind CSS for styling. Provides a reusable primitive for displaying user identity across applications.
